posts.text:
The Supreme Court already ruled that voter ID is constitutional 

We enacted it in Missouri; we should enact it nationwide

Video

The American people want voter ID to secure our elections; the Senate needs to deliver

If we can’t pass the SAVE Act, I don’t know what Congress can pass

Video

Democrats don’t want voter ID because they want illegals to vote in our elections. 

We need to force the Democrats to hold the Senate floor until they relent so we can pass the SAVE Act

Video

Congress needs to do its job

 Fund DHS and TSA

Video

Children are missing. Kids are being trafficked. 

Yet Democrats refuse to fund the Department of Homeland Security

Video

Hundreds of Missourians need assistance after their homes were decimated by tornadoes 

Yet Democrats refuse to fund FEMA

Video

In the last year alone, we have seen an 8,000% increase in death threats to law enforcement, a 1,300% increase in assaults, and a 124% increase in vehicular attacks against law enforcement

Yet Democrats refuse to fund DHS

Video

80% of Americans are in favor of voter ID. 95% of Missourians are in favor of voter ID 

Pass the SAVE America Act NOW

It’s time to ban mifepristone for abortion. 

And it’s time to empower these women to hold these foreign manufacturers accountable

Video

My latest in @realDailyWire on why Congress must ban the chemical abortion drug: 

dailywire.com/news/the-abort…
